prompt: Create an ultra-realistic full-body vertical fashion portrait of a beautiful young woman walking toward the camera in an elegant luxury hotel lobby. She has long dark brown wavy hair styled in loose polished curls over one shoulder, a natural poised posture, and a softly confident expression while looking directly at the camera. She wears a dark indigo denim off-shoulder jumpsuit with exactly two layered ruffle tiers across the neckline, short off-shoulder sleeves, wide-leg pants, and a matching fabric belt tied in a bow at the waist. Add refined accessories: exactly five visible accessories consisting of large silver hoop earrings, a delicate necklace with a small pendant, a slim bracelet on one wrist, a gold watch on the other wrist, and a small black clutch held in her right hand. The setting is a warm, upscale hotel interior with glossy cream marble flooring, beige walls, soft golden ambient lighting, blurred wooden console tables, framed mirrors, table lamps, and exactly two sparkling crystal chandeliers visible near the ceiling. Use shallow depth of field with the background softly blurred, warm cinematic color grading, realistic fabric texture, natural skin tones, balanced studio-like exposure, and high-end editorial photography quality. Compose the subject centered, full length from head to feet, with symmetrical lobby perspective and no text, watermark, or extra people.
